title: Compressed Blocks
description: A solution to having one of too many
body:
# A remake of the block compression from extra utils 2.

**Some questions for you:**
- Are you tired of having a chest filled with only one block type?
- Are you tired of having to move your huge pile of cobblestone in a shulker box?
- Are you still debating about Minecraft having a inventory issue?

If at least some of them were true then I have a solution for you!

**I give to you compressed blocks!**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30a44ef0225fd338a6e4399d918c4e7bfcc5bcfb.png)

These small blocks equal to nine blocks each, **which you can also reverse!**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78626e9bce5655e5629e4a479cee160173c0eab3.png)

More will compression sizes and blocks will be added!
